intake.risk_posture: Moderate UI/product behavior change with bounded root-fix slices and Browser checks for transient behavior.
intake.harness_policy: Goal docs and focused tests are allowed; no dependency, remote, AGENTS, deploy, or PR changes without explicit approval.
protected_areas: unrelated Builder/Collection behavior except shared sort/filter state
validation_commands: focused npx vitest run commands per slice
Browser spot checks through the in-app Browser plugin
intake.stop_condition: Stop when all follow-up issues are terminal, a product/design decision is required, verification fails twice for the same slice, or scope expands beyond the follow-up list.

focus_areas.name: Timeline preview date copy and wrapping
focus_areas.evidence: User clarified banners and events need clearer visible end-date language; D-Zones are effectively unaffected because they are not previewed before active.

focus_areas.name: Sidebar-safe live popovers
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found modal overlay click handling closes popovers on sidebar clicks because only popover containment is considered.

focus_areas.name: Independent main/sub scaling filters
focus_areas.evidence: Current global role filter cannot express Main: Amp plus Sub: Keyflare.

focus_areas.name: Awakener tabs and default tab preference
focus_areas.evidence: User corrected desired visible tabs: hide Overview and Teams, keep Builds, Lore last, Upgrades default; optional persisted default tab is acceptable if clean.

focus_areas.name: Route modal close teardown
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found a route close can fall through to rendering a stale route-sourced stack entry as overlay detail.

focus_areas.name: Sort persistence without URL churn
focus_areas.evidence: Persisted sorting makes routine URL writes noisy; URL params still matter for legacy/share overrides.

candidates.title: Banner/event preview date display
candidates.evidence: Existing countdown helper hides end date for soon-upcoming items and uses unclear start-only date range for long-range upcoming previews.
candidates.next: Implemented preview-specific display text for banners/events; event rows stack in cramped cards, banner hero stays contextual, and banner drawer uses compact date ranges.

candidates.title: Sidebar-safe live popovers
candidates.evidence: Sidebar controls are inside the panel but outside the popover, so they are currently treated as outside-popover clicks.
candidates.next: Implemented narrow preserve zones for sidebar controls and live current-rank popover context.

candidates.title: Independent main/sub scaling filters
candidates.evidence: User intent is role-specific selected stat buckets, not a global role mode.
candidates.next: Implemented independent Any/Main/Sub scaling buckets, active chips, view-model filtering, and legacy URL migration.

candidates.title: Detail tabs and default preference
candidates.evidence: First pass hid Builds, but user intended Teams to be hidden instead; persisted default tab can make Upgrades default customizable.
candidates.next: Implemented visible Upgrades/Skills/Builds/Lore tabs and persisted default tab handling for route-less awakener opens.

candidates.title: Route-modal close teardown root fix
candidates.evidence: When route item disappears, stale route stack entry may be used as overlay fallback for one render.
candidates.next: Implemented route-stack filtering so route-sourced entries are not reused as overlay fallback after route close.

candidates.title: Sort persistence without URL churn
candidates.evidence: Sort should persist locally; writing every sort change into the URL makes the URL a preference store.
candidates.next: Implemented local sort persistence with URL sort params retained as explicit read overrides only.

maintenance.title: Atlas/spritesheet for tiny assets
maintenance.reason: User explicitly deferred the atlas/spritesheet idea to another day.

tasks.title: Map follow-up QA issues after first Saya QA pass
tasks.expected_output: Evidence-backed candidates for date copy, popovers, scaling filters, tabs, modal close, and sort URL ownership.

receipt.summary: Read-only scouts mapped the follow-up QA issues and root-fix boundaries.
evidence: Timeline date copy should be fixed for banners and events, while avoiding unintended D-Zone UX changes.
Sidebar clicks close popovers because the overlay click handler ignores panel containment.
Independent main/sub scaling selections require state shape changes rather than a global role filter.
Visible awakening tabs should be Upgrades, Skills, Builds, Lore, with Overview and Teams hidden/compatible.
Route modal close can temporarily render stale route stack data as overlay detail.
Persisted sort preferences make URL sort writes optional noise; URL params should remain overrides.

tasks.title: Implement follow-up Saya QA fixes
tasks.expected_output: Integrated implementation for all queued candidates, with focused tests and Browser receipts.

receipt.summary: Implemented all C1-C6 follow-up slices and folded user corrections into the final banner/event date surface behavior.
evidence: Timeline hero/drawer/event surfaces now use separate date formats: hero contextual, drawer compact date range, event rows stack on cramped cards.
24 popover controller now supports live current-rank contexts while sidebar controls are marked as popover-preserving zones.
Scaling filters model Any/Main/Sub selected stat buckets independently.
Awakener visible tabs are Upgrades, Skills, Builds, Lore; Overview/Teams remain compatible hidden routes.
Route modal host no longer renders route-sourced stack entries as overlay fallback during close.
Database sort changes persist locally and remove/avoid normal sort params in shared URLs.

final_audit.summary: Saya QA follow-up goal completed without committing. User-facing refinements remain available for manual review in the dirty tree.
validation: npm run test -- --run src\domain\timeline.test.ts src\pages\timeline\BannerCard.test.tsx src\pages\timeline\EventCard.test.tsx
Focused combined Vitest suite for modal/popover, scaling filters, tabs/defaults, modal host, and timeline surfaces
Browser checks: event rows stack start/end dates; banner hero stays contextual; banner drawer shows compact date range; visible tabs omit Overview/Teams; scaling buckets exist; sort changes clean URL
